title: Don't Build Your Own AI Inference! It's Too Expensive & Risky! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof advises against building independent AI inference infrastructure due to extreme difficulty, astronomical costs, and high financial risk. The recommendation is to rely on established service providers instead.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof argues against building independent AI inference infrastructure, citing the extreme difficulty, astronomical costs, and high financial risk involved. The recommendation is to rely on established service providers instead. The takeaway: self-hosting inference is treated as a cost and risk problem rather than a technical milestone, with managed providers positioned as the default choice.
